name: obsidian-habits
description: Habit tracker with streaks, charts, and statistics. Log daily habits from a carousel dashboard or sidebar panel, pause habits without losing streaks, and export printable PDF reports.

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run lint && npm version patch && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm run build && npm run lint && npm version minor && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm run build && npm run lint && npm version major && git push --follow-tags

author: James Spratt
